synthesis.description: Controls synthesis behavior. mode: 'auto' (intelligent assessment based on note accumulation), 'manual' (explicit only), 'batch' (multiple then all at once), 'deterministic' (after every ingest). kb_template: 'default' (minimal) or 'comprehensive' (predefined topics)

ingest.description: Default crawler to use. 'auto' means automatic detection based on URL pattern

paths.description: All generated content (captures, feeds, notes, books, catalog) stored under data/
